name: cuotiben-backend
description: Minimal Express backend for CuoTiBen AI parsing.

scripts.test:ai-gateway: node --test tests/models/modelRegistry.test.js tests/models/aiClient.test.js tests/models/retryPolicy.test.js tests/models/circuitBreaker.test.js tests/models/responseCache.test.js tests/integration/aiGateway.preflight.test.js tests/integration/aiGateway.retry503.test.js
scripts.check:ai-gateway: node --check src/models/modelRegistry.js src/models/providers/claudeProvider.js src/models/aiClient.js src/models/retryPolicy.js src/models/circuitBreaker.js src/models/responseCache.js src/models/errors.js src/routes/ai.js src/middleware/errorHandler.js src/config/env.js
